children.heading: Board
children.label: 1 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the National Science Board.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 2 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the National Science Foundation.

children.heading: NSF INCLUDES
children.label: 3 NSF INCLUDES
children.text: The term “NSF INCLUDES” means the initiative carried out under .section 19012 of this title

children.heading: STEM ecosystem
children.label: 4 STEM ecosystem
children.text: The term “STEM ecosystem” means a local, regional, or statewide network, consortium, or multi-sector partnership, which may be led or co-led by a nonprofit organizational entity, that is operating in the United States with the goal of supporting participation in STEM study, activities, and career pathways as defined in the CoSTEM Annual Progress Report of 2020 with a broad range of non-Federal partners.
